review_title: As a current user of ZenHR
description: As a new employee in our company, I can see who my colleagues as well as the hierarchy. There is also calendar to track the holidays. It is so helpful for me. Especially I have all my important documents stored in the system.
author: Pauline Khate S.
pros: It is so easy to use and more convenient, you can install the app in your phone and even log in to your laptop. It can track where you time in and time out. It is accurately recorded. You can request documents you need and also you can access it any time in the system.
cons: In my 3 months of using ZenHR. I think none, I didn’t encounter any issues about it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

pros: Easy to use it means very useful for on site or remotely jobs for requests leave or vacation and till now it secured and making updates always
cons: payroll section important but less important than other and also documents section it should uploaded our contracts every year

description: I use ZenHR to check in and out at work and occasionally request time off. I find it helpful and user friendly enough to use and definitely is a much better option compared to the fingerprint check in/out that some companies still adopt.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: ZenHR is a very helpful tool for employees to manage their timesheets, vacations, and other requests, and at the same times for employers to track their employees' schedules whether to check attendance or to issue payroll. The software has a lot of features and the customer support is very responsive and helpful.
cons: Some thing I dislike in the ZenHR software is the geolocation bug in the clock-in and clock-out features: Sometimes the location is stuck and checking in/out at the office would appear like doing so from another location. Also, I don't like that employees are not able to check their total checked in hours during the month, which can be helpful to manage their hours and schedules overall.

author: emily H.
pros: the organization of the website and how easy it is to manage, as well as the efficiency it produces for requests like sick leaves and personal days.
cons: the app doesn't always register punch in times immediately, and it used to register punch ins and punch outs opposite of each other
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Comprehensive and User-Friendly HR Solution with Minor Improvements Needed
description: My overall experience with ZenHR has been positive. It offers a user-friendly interface, comprehensive HR features, and helpful automation. It's especially strong in compliance with local labor laws. However, it could improve on integration options and mobile app functionality. Despite these, the customer support is responsive and resolves issues quickly. Overall, it's a reliable HR solution.
author: Nada S.
pros: User-friendly interface that’s easy to navigate. Comprehensive HR features covering payroll, attendance, and performance management. Automation of manual tasks saves time and reduces errors. Compliance with local labor laws, tailored for MENA markets. Employee self-service for leave requests and payslips. Cloud-based, enabling access from anywhere.
cons: Limited integrations with other software, which may require manual data entry or additional workarounds. Customization limitations in some features, especially for businesses with very specific needs. Occasional bugs or glitches reported, though usually resolved quickly by support. Learning curve for first-time users, especially when setting up more advanced features. Mobile app functionality can be limited compared to the desktop version.

description: So far it’s been a really nice and pleasant experience, using the app made life so much easier, would definitely recommend it to everyone.
author: Brian S.
pros: It’s such a great management site for employees, I loved that I can easily monitor when i’ve logged in and for how long for any day. Additionally, requesting time off has never been easier, and again monitoring my remaining days off and the documents i’ve received from HR is great.
cons: Only sometimes it could glitch out and not monitor the actual hours i’ve worked, and still shows me as logged in, even though i’ve logged out, or logs me out by itself. However since it monitors everything so it’s not an issue, as on the app it still shows that i’ve logged in at the time i did.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient HR Solution with Room for Customization
description: My overall experience with ZenHR has been very positive. The platform offers a user-friendly interface and a comprehensive set of tools that make managing HR tasks more efficient. It simplifies processes like payroll, employee onboarding, and performance tracking, which has been incredibly valuable for our team. I also appreciate the customer support, which has been responsive and helpful. However, there are a few areas where I see potential for improvement. For instance, expanding the customization options for reports and workflows would be a great enhancement, as different organizations may have unique needs. Nonetheless, ZenHR is a strong, reliable solution, and I’ve seen firsthand how it helps streamline HR operations
author: alaa H.
pros: is its innovative approach to simplifying and automating HR processes. The platform's user-friendly interface, combined with its comprehensive range of features, shows a clear understanding of the challenges HR departments face, especially in growing businesses. I also appreciate the company's commitment to creating a positive workplace culture, both for its clients and its own team, which reflects in ZenHR's focus on enhancing employee
cons: One aspect I found could be improved in ZenHR is the customization options for certain features. While the platform is generally intuitive and efficient, offering more flexibility in tailoring specific tools to the unique needs of different businesses could enhance the user experience even further. That said, I appreciate that ZenHR is constantly evolving, and I’m confident these areas will continue to improve with time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
